title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete UI
scenario: Verify the delete icon is displayed below the Log out button in the Account tab under General settings, consistent with the Figma design.
steps: 3. Scroll down below the Log out button.
4. Verify that the delete icon is present.
5. Compare the delete icon with the Figma design to ensure it matches.
expected: The delete icon is present below the Log out button in the Account tab under General settings and matches the Figma design.
